# Engineering Discipline

Think before coding. State visible goals and do not assume hidden requirements. Choose the simplest working solution, avoid speculative abstractions, make surgical changes, and verify observable behavior with focused checks.
<!-- END CASOPS MANAGED CONTENT -->
